files.notes: This file contains 4 distinct lesson sections from the Guide Lessons department. The first lesson is incomplete (missing its end), the second lesson appears to be just a header with no content, the third lesson is complete and covers surnames/genealogy, and the fourth lesson covers literature. There's also a partial fifth lesson on Home Economics that appears to be cut off at the end.
